model_contract.description: Cross-agent model resilience contract — each agent uses the other's fallback as its default

hermes.rationale: HERMES deliberates with Kimi K2.6 deep reasoning by default. Falls back to MiniMax-M2.7 for fast constitutional triage.

openclaw.rationale: OpenClaw operates on Kimi Code by default. Falls back to MiniMax (HERMES's default) during primary outages.

deliberation.notes: Current HERMES uses deterministic F1-F13 floor regex evaluation. Future: delegate to configured LLM when confidence < 0.85.
